name: _GET_WATER_MAP_ZONE_AT_COORDS
comment:
Returns the zone's name hash if its type matches one of the following:
- LAKE
- RIVER
- OIL_SPILL
- SWAMP
- OCEAN
- CREEK
- POND
- GLACIER
lua:
-- 0x5BA7A68A346A5A91 · build 1207
local x = 0.0
local y = 0.0
local z = 0.0
local result = GetWaterMapZoneAtCoords(x, y, z)
